title: gentiana selatium
intro: Gentiana selatium, also known as small gentian, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family, native to the western coastal regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a bitter tonic, and has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Gentiana selatium include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Gentiana selatium include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water.
